review_title: Great if you have the money and need
description: I think it is a great product and it is efferent. It is a good way to organize thee business and keep it setup
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It integrates with the payroll and it can be embedded on the site. So easy to log in and there are a bunch of different options when you are buying the device to have for your business.
cons: if you don't have adp it doesn't integrate and ADP is expensive to have depending on the side of your business and the need.

review_title: Easy to use, gets the job done. Done deal.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's very easy to use and intuitive. Been using it for years now to clock in/out and review my time sheet.
cons: I haven't encountered any issue yet. The interface could use an update, to make it a bit more easy on the eyes and modern. But also, if it ain't broke don't fix it!

review_title: Operations Manage EZ Labor Review
description: The program completed the payroll task that were needed, however it was not that efficient.
author: Michele C.
pros: We were able to track our employees time.
cons: We were on an older platform of ADP Total Source and the process during payroll to import information was not efficient.

review_title: We have used ADP EzLabor software to manage all of our team member's timekeeping system.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: 1. Very easy to understand for managers to update time keeping oversights. 2. Love the feature of allocating different employees to different departments for reporting purposes.
cons: 1. It is not easy to initially comprehend and update. 2. Can not calculate week to date payroll costs. 3. No scheduling ability to understand cost of scheduling. Must be completed outside of ADP.

review_title: Makes Time Off Tracking, Requests Easy
description: Quickly keep track of time off requests and personal balances, get time off requests approved quickly.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I love the fact that I can use this software to easily request time off without having to hope my supervisor inputs it on the right date and it takes some of the "having to ask" for time off out of the equation. The alerts my supervisor gets to approve time off ensures my time off requests are processed quickly. I can request time off pretty far in advance, too. It's also nice to be able to quickly access my time off accruals and balances without having to bug my supervisor.
cons: There really isn't much I don't like about this software as a user, it meets all of my basic requirements and needs.

review_title: Dated, miserable software
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It does its job.... eventually. There is some support for hierarchies and structure. It integrates with other ADP products if you are using it for payroll and related stuff.
cons: It's a terrible user interface. It looks like it was created in the 1980s. The user experience is abysmal. All of the employees dread coming into this system to log their out-of-office hours. This is a prime example of a enterprise ecosystem that is not even trying at all to be user friendly.

review_title: Simple payroll and employee time tracking management system
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's pretty straightforward once you know the ins and out and there's not much to do aside from the main things.
cons: Its very outdated in UI and sometimes data doesn't pull in as fast as you'd like. Pulling reports can also be a bit of a hassle.

review_title: Great tool for new HR Staff
description: Great HR tool. Easy to learn and very handy for small business.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: As a first tool I have used in HR position I found that it is very easy to use and it is not requiring a lot of training. Great tool to track and maintain vacation days. Also, gives you an insight when it comes to statutory holidays, which you are not always aware of.
cons: After a while you get used to a software and the only thing that can be listed as a cons would be outdated design.

review_title: Great on the go software and app.
description: It was quick and easy. It did not take very much time at all.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The functionality of this software was easy and intuitive. The app made for fast access and input into the program.
cons: The price was not as competitive as other services, but functionality, support, and ease of use made up for the small price difference.

review_title: Loved ADP
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Asp was easy to use. Though I did not care for the batches it did make it easier to find when looking for something.
cons: The only thing I did not care for is the price of ADP. Ezlabor was a little difficult to learn but was easier once figured out.

review_title: This software solves our complex problems in capturing work in multiple location and pay rates.
description: Our complex labor management report is now accurate in recording financial statements.
author: Crisanto C.
pros: Self service feature is really amazing. Employees have many options to record their hours and they have mobile app for easy access and checking real time transactions.
cons: Nothing to say much. Only the maintenance schedule of the software once or twice a month. But overall, with all advance notification, employees are aware and have no problem with it.

review_title: Time keeping systems with all the tools you need to track attendance and hours.
author: Kathy B.
pros: Easy to use. Team is great to work with you on issues. Worked with our IT team to make sure we can everything in place prior to instillation. Also, we implemented a point system and the team helped us with this process. Much easier than the old way of tracking on a spreadsheet.

review_title: Easy to use & organized
author: Whitnee A.
pros: I like how easy it is to access benefits and work history through this software. This software is also very organized making it easy to find what you are looking for as a first time user.
cons: What I like least about this software is how you can get locked out of your account randomly. It could be an administrator issue but it happens more often than I would like.

review_title: Easy to use platform!
description: We use the biometric timeclocks with this software and feel that we are accurately collecting time data so we are compliant with wage and hour rules.
author: Lisa B.
pros: The Manager Home screen is an easy to use dashboard that notify's manager's of tasks that need to be completed. The reports are not difficult to set up, but when you have difficulties, the customer support team is very responsive and friendly. I like the format of the timecards. It is easy to review and make adjustments. The notes function is great for managers to notify payroll of any important informaton.
cons: There are some quirks to how my company processes the payroll, the format of the time file is not as customizable as I would like it to be.

review_title: ADP Use Review
description: It is quiet good when it comes to tracking time off, timesheet details and easy to use.
author: Pratima C.
pros: The in detail tracking of each task. Making time off request is easy
cons: Less user friendly as it does not provide access to old timesheets (more than a month) Hard to locate through internet search

review_title: Very difficult to set up different rules
author: Manoj K.
pros: Simple to use, not too costly, does not require high powered PC, easy to export to the payroll system.
cons: Difficult to set up rules and not many options to set up different rules for processing of weekly staff pays weekly

review_title: Simple product that gets the job done
author: Terence T.
pros: I liked how simple and plain the layout was. Easy to place in hours and pull out reports.
cons: The scheduling is a little complicated, and if you don't use some features, it'll notify you and there seems to be no way to bypass these notifications unless you use those features (like scheduling). The scheduling isn't so flexible with weekly changes at work.

review_title: time clock
author: Jessey C.
pros: I love how simple and straightforward this product is for clocking in and out of work. I mean I love logging into EZlabor at the end of the day because that CLOCK OUT is my favorite button.
cons: Whats to complain about? Its so simplistic there is no room for error or really any need for improvement
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: EzLabor by ADP
description: I am still getting used to this, but I like it for the most part so far.
author: Natalie M.
pros: I like this software compared to what my work used to use since it is paperless and all the employees can be connected together with ease.
cons: There are some features not available and I have found difficulty with splitting shifts and I wish there was better methods for communicating with co-workers.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I manage the payroll department for my company. We use adp products
author: Jibri J.
pros: The synergy amd customer support functions are awesome. Veey good respmse time and attention to us as a client. It works well with other adp products and systems
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: My ADP experience
description: I feel adp was quite confusing and really in inaccurate source of tracking time you are actually working.
author: CIcely B.
pros: There wasn't much I liked about ADP honestly, except the fact that I could clock in and clock out easily.
cons: I feel it didn't accurately track my vacation and sick time or my clock in and clock out information accurately.

review_title: User-Friendly Interface and Efficient Automation
description: My overall experience with ADP ezLaborManager is generally positive due to its intuitive interface and easy automation features that streamline time tracking, scheduling, and payroll processes. The system’s ability to integrate with other ADP tools make it easier to manage my daily tasks.
author: ANDREW F.
pros: Its user-friendly interface and efficient automation of time tracking and payroll processes, saving valuable time in my extremely busy day.
cons: Initially I felt like there was a steep learning curve for new users and occasional glitches in the mobile app.

review_title: Reliable Time Tracking App
description: ADP ezLaborManager is a helpful tool for managing employee time and attendance. It saves a lot of time on manual tracking and helps keep everything organized
author: Heldor G.
pros: I really liked how easy it was to track employee hours and manage time cards
cons: It can take some time to get used to where everything is.

review_title: When I have a problem with the software I quite often get passed around to a variety of people.
author: Pam M.
pros: Booking time off is very easy for staff. Once you assign a schedule to an employee there isn't a lot that the employee has to do. Unless they ver from what's scheduled the system does everything for the employee.
cons: We have to extract our hours from ezlm on Thursday, so we have to have employee force through their Friday time. This causes many issues. Not always software related, more with our processes, but still a pain point. If would be great if we had a way to do a mass push through of the Friday at the end of the pay period. The lunch deduction causes many issues. The system isn't updated right away, so there is a 90 second delay from when EE's submit a change, to when the mainframe is updated. This causes lots of problems. The fact that when an employee has requested less than a full day off (ie. 2 hours of Flex), the system doesn't generate the hours the employee is actually working. The system has a schedule for 99% of our staff, so why can't it generate the working part of the schedule. This causes many issues with staff shorting themselves.

review_title: I use this daily to clock in and out and see my time sheet for different time periods.
description: This software allows me and my team to easily see our time card and my pay stubs. I also use this daily to clock in and out and it is just as easy of not easier than a time clock. Also there is less cost since you do not need to buy more equipment like cables or a time clock.
author: Andrew E.
pros: This is easy to access and all the functions you need are right there on the home page. You can quickly verify your clock ins/outs and make sure your time sheet is accurate. We use this to apply for PTO as well. Very useful product.
cons: The website appears slightly outdated and the buttons are a little small such as the sidebar on the right with all of the main options on it. I would expect those to be more prominent and easy to click coming from a UX background.
